# BINGO Telescope — https://bingotelescope.org
# Robots exclusion rules

User-agent: *
Allow: /
Disallow: /admin/
Disallow: /_astro/

# Crawl-delay to be polite with the server
Crawl-delay: 2

# Specific rules for Google
User-agent: Googlebot
Allow: /
Disallow: /admin/

# Allow Google to index images
User-agent: Googlebot-Image
Allow: /images/

# Sitemap location (auto-generated by @astrojs/sitemap)
Sitemap: https://bingotelescope.org/sitemap-index.xml
